scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c blue,magenta "pnpm --dir backend dev" "pnpm --dir frontend dev"
scripts.install:all: pnpm --dir backend install && pnpm --dir frontend install
scripts.test: pnpm --dir backend test && pnpm --dir frontend test
scripts.lint: pnpm --dir backend lint && pnpm --dir frontend lint
scripts.format: pnpm --dir backend format && pnpm --dir frontend format && pnpm --dir e2e format
scripts.format:check: pnpm --dir backend format:check && pnpm --dir frontend format:check && pnpm --dir e2e format:check
